name: Company Microwave Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice and butter in the microwave on HIGH (100%) for 4 to 6 minutes or until the rice has browned, stirring twice during cooking.
2. Add celery and green onions, stir, then cook an additional minute.
3. Stir in remaining ingredients except mushrooms and peas. Return to microwave.
4. Let stand covered for 10 minutes. If mushrooms and peas are done, serve; if not, microwave an additional 3-5 minutes until complete.
5. Fluff with a fork before serving.
